examples.title: Algorithm: Circular Singly Linked List
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating a circular singly linked list
examples.code:
CLASS Node
 DATA value
 POINTER next
END CLASS

CLASS CircularSinglyLinkedList
 POINTER head
 POINTER tail

 PROCEDURE insertAtBeginning(value)
 CREATE newNode OF TYPE Node
 SET newNode.value TO value
 IF head IS NULL THEN
 SET head TO newNode
 SET tail TO newNode
 SET newNode.next TO newNode
 ELSE
 SET newNode.next TO head
 SET tail.next TO newNode
 SET head TO newNode
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE insertAtEnd(value)
 CREATE newNode OF TYPE Node
 SET newNode.value TO value
 IF head IS NULL THEN
 SET head TO newNode
 SET tail TO newNode
 SET newNode.next TO newNode
 ELSE
 SET newNode.next TO head
 SET tail.next TO newNode
 SET tail TO newNode
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE deleteFromBeginning()
 IF head IS NULL THEN
 RETURN
 END IF
 IF head.next IS head THEN
 SET head TO NULL
 SET tail TO NULL
 ELSE
 SET head TO head.next
 SET tail.next TO head
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE deleteFromEnd()
 IF head IS NULL THEN
 RETURN
 END IF
 IF head.next IS head THEN
 SET head TO NULL
 SET tail TO NULL
 ELSE
 SET tail TO node BEFORE tail
 SET tail.next TO head
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE
END CLASS
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic implementation of a circular singly linked list with insertion and deletion operations.

examples.title: Python: Circular Singly Linked List
examples.description: Python implementation of a circular singly linked list
examples.explanation: This Python code implements a circular singly linked list with insertion and deletion operations.
examples.timeComplexity: O(1) for insertion and deletion at the beginning and end
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) where n is the number of nodes in the list
